{{CargoRelic
|name=Model G Loom
|class_id=22012
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-02
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Jul 2, 1923 AD, Sakichi Toyoda earned the first bucket of gold via Model G Loom.<br>Model G Loom was invented by Sakichi Toyoda, the boss of the Toyoda company. Unlike previous looms, it didn't need to be operated manually, so one worker could operate 3 to 4 looms at the same time. And if the warp was broken, the loom would stop working and change the shuttle automatically. So the rate of good-quality products and efficiency were highly improved, ensuring the strong productivity of Toyoda company.
|fame=48
|art=25
|fth=19
|civ=28
|tech=34
|ss1=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +8%
|ss2=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +16%
|ss3=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +24%
|ss4=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +40%
|ss7=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +40%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Prismatic Armor Base Effect +40% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill I.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion DEF +1%
}}
